# Data Quality

Collect quality evidence and evaluate declared business-rule invariants.

## kiri invariants

Evaluate declared business-rule invariants.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri invariants [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri invariants check`](#kiri-invariants-check) - Evaluate silver-business invariants...

### kiri invariants check

Evaluate silver-business invariants...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri invariants check [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Target alias from kiri.yml::targets. | no |  |  |
| `--severity` | Which invariant severities to evaluate. | no | all | `error`, `warn`, `drop`, `all` |
| `--format` | Output format. | no | text | `text`, `json` |
| `--strict` | Exit 1 when warn-severity invariants breach. | no | False |  |

## kiri quality

Quality-engine evidence collection

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri quality [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri quality collect-evidence`](#kiri-quality-collect-evidence) - Convert a dbt-test run into per-contract...

### kiri quality collect-evidence

Convert a dbt-test run into per-contract...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri quality collect-evidence [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--target-dir`, `-t` | Path to the dbt project's ``target/`` directory - the collector reads ``run_results.json`` + ``manifest.json`` from here. | yes |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Kirimana project root (defaults to ``$KIRIMANA_PROJECT`` or the current directory). | no |  |  |
| `--out`, `-o` | Where to write the JSONL evidence file. Defaults to ``<project>/.kirimana/quality_engine/evidence.jsonl``. | no |  |  |

## kiri sla

Data SLA enforcement - check...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri sla [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri sla check`](#kiri-sla-check) - Check SLA declarations across the project...

### kiri sla check

Check SLA declarations across the project...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri sla check [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--target` | Environment target (default: project's default_target). | no |  |  |
| `--contract` | Check only this contract (by name). | no |  |  |
| `--dry-run` | Don't actually dispatch breaches; print what would happen. | no | False |  |
